selection_basis.ledger_reason: This is the next untouched compact archive sibling after the mutation packet and the clearest packet-handoff contradiction object in the same strip.
selection_basis.bounded_goal: Reduce the parent into a smaller packet-handoff batch that preserves one executed ZIPv2 cycle, final closure through a save-request row, same-name retained-versus-consumed strategy divergence, packet-facing residue above final bookkeeping, and relocation residue without promoting any of it.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Best next sibling once the packet-e2e contradiction packet is preserved.
Useful later for broader packet-failure comparison outside the compact ZIPv2 strip.

raw_source_reread_reason: The parent packet already retains the executed-cycle core, save-request handoff row, final-hash split, retained-versus-consumed packet divergence, snapshot/SIM residue, and relocation drift needed for second-pass refinement, and the consulted A2-mid anchors already preserve the closest packet-identity and bookkeeping-overhang comparisons.
